scope_note: This panel summarizes the structured course-rigor and application-guidance notes currently exported for this school. It remains source-backed and does not infer missing requirements.

areas.name: Course rigor
areas.summary: UChicago does not provide a single minimum course-rigor formula on the cited required-materials page.
areas.detail: UChicago does not provide a single minimum course-rigor formula on the cited required-materials page.

areas.name: Recommendations
areas.summary: UChicago requires two teacher evaluations and a secondary school report with school counselor recommendation.
areas.detail: UChicago requires two teacher evaluations and a secondary school report with school counselor recommendation.

areas.name: Essays
areas.summary: UChicago requires two supplemental essays overall, and its supplement specifically includes one extended essay and one short 'why UChicago' essay.
areas.detail: UChicago requires two supplemental essays overall, and its supplement specifically includes one extended essay and one short 'why UChicago' essay.
